# LumoLend

> LumoLend (https://lumolend.com) is a U.S. mortgage marketplace operated by Honest Casa LLC (NMLS #1566096, CA DRE #02022356). Borrowers price a mortgage scenario in minutes with live indicative rates, then a licensed loan officer reviews the exact scenario and takes it to closing. AI finds it. A human funds it.

## What LumoLend does

- Conversational mortgage pricing across six scenario types: home purchase, refinance (rate/term and cash-out), DSCR rental property loans, short-term rental (Airbnb/VRBO) loans, fix & flip bridge loans, and HELOC / home equity loans.
- Live indicative rate ranges, monthly payment, and loan amount update as the borrower answers — no documents and no login required to price a scenario.
- Flow-specific underwriting logic: DSCR coverage math, bridge loan-to-cost caps, HELOC debt-to-income and CLTV ceilings, VA routing, and bank-statement income detection for self-employed borrowers.
- Every submitted scenario is reviewed by a licensed loan officer. Nothing is auto-approved, and pre-approval letters are issued only after human review.
- Each scenario shops a live lender panel (100+ programs compared per run).

## How it works

1. The borrower answers a short conversational flow; pricing updates live.
2. At "Your Terms" they see three loan structures with indicative rate ranges and lock the one they want.
3. They submit contact details and property address; the scenario routes to a licensed mortgage loan originator, who is introduced by email.
4. The loan officer reviews the file, firms pricing against the lender panel, and guides the borrower to closing.

## Guides (expert content, reviewed by a licensed MLO)

- https://lumolend.com/guides/ — guide hub
- https://lumolend.com/guides/dscr-loans/ — Coverage math, requirements, prepay trade-offs.
- https://lumolend.com/guides/bank-statement-loans/ — Qualify on deposits, not tax returns.
- https://lumolend.com/guides/airbnb-str-loans/ — Actuals vs projections, the 20% haircut.
- https://lumolend.com/guides/fix-and-flip-bridge-loans/ — LTC caps, ARV ceilings, draw schedules.
- https://lumolend.com/guides/heloc-vs-cash-out-refi/ — Second lien vs new first — the real math.
- https://lumolend.com/guides/va-loans-zero-down/ — Eligibility, COE, funding fee, entitlement.
- https://lumolend.com/guides/dti-explained/ — The formula, the caps, and how to fix yours.
- https://lumolend.com/guides/preapproval-vs-prequalification/ — What sellers trust, and why amounts matter.
- https://lumolend.com/guides/itin-mortgage-loans/ — Home loans for ITIN holders, no SSN required
- https://lumolend.com/guides/asset-depletion-loans/ — Qualify on savings and investments, not income
- https://lumolend.com/guides/mortgage-for-1099-contractors/ — Mortgage paths for contractors and gig workers
- https://lumolend.com/guides/self-employed-mortgage-requirements/ — The full documentation playbook for business owners
- https://lumolend.com/guides/cash-out-refinance-investment-property/ — Pull equity out of a rental the smart way.
- https://lumolend.com/guides/heloc-on-investment-property/ — Tap rental equity without touching your first lien.
- https://lumolend.com/guides/investment-property-down-payment/ — What you'll really put down, path by path.
- https://lumolend.com/guides/second-home-vs-investment-property/ — Get the occupancy classification right the first time.
- https://lumolend.com/guides/interest-only-mortgages/ — When paying interest only actually makes sense
- https://lumolend.com/guides/prepayment-penalties-explained/ — What early payoff really costs investors
- https://lumolend.com/guides/mortgage-rate-locks-explained/ — When to lock and what it costs
- https://lumolend.com/guides/fha-vs-conventional/ — Which low-down-payment path costs less
- https://lumolend.com/guides/dscr-loans-texas/ — Heavy property taxes meet landlord-friendly courts
- https://lumolend.com/guides/dscr-loans-florida/ — Wind insurance, condo rules, doc stamps, STRs
- https://lumolend.com/guides/dscr-loans-california/ — High prices, thin ratios — sizing leverage honestly
- https://lumolend.com/guides/dscr-loans-arizona/ — Low taxes and STR-friendly law keep deals penciling
- https://lumolend.com/guides/dscr-loans-tennessee/ — Cabin STRs, low taxes, landlord-friendly cash flow
- https://lumolend.com/guides/dscr-loans-north-carolina/ — Charlotte-to-coast coverage math and closing quirks
- https://lumolend.com/guides/dscr-loans-georgia/ — Atlanta rentals, fast courts, intangibles-tax math
- https://lumolend.com/guides/dscr-loans-ohio/ — High coverage ratios, county tax traps, loan floors

## Company

- Brand: LumoLend, operated by Honest Casa LLC (dba LumoLend)
- Company NMLS ID: 1566096 · California DRE License: 02022356
- Loan officer: Moh Alloo, Mortgage Loan Originator, NMLS #2732105 (West Capital Lending)
- Contact: desk@lumolend.com
- Related brand: HonestCasa (https://honestcasa.com), a home-equity marketplace by the same company

## Disclaimers

Rates shown are illustrative indicative ranges, not offers or commitments to lend; actual terms are determined by the lending partner after underwriting. LumoLend does not directly originate, fund, or service mortgage loans. Equal Housing Lender.
